description: EWY 11-lot overwrite roll: buy back Mar 13 2026 151C and sell Mar 20 2026 150C as one combo
notes: This is the IBKR-style roll expressed as a BAG order so the close and new sale execute together.
Legs: BUY to close 2026-03-13 151C, SELL to open 2026-03-20 150C.
Delayed leg marks were approximately 0.00 x 0.05 on the old short and 0.35 x 0.40 on the new short, so realistic roll credit is about 0.30 to 0.35.
Use this instead of the two-step files if you want atomic execution and no legging risk.
